response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (critical for client-facing insurance projects), and the resume reflects a senior/entrepreneurial profile inconsistent with an entry-level role requiring team integration and client collaboration in a specialized sector.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting required fluency
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, mismatched for entry-level role
No clear evidence of Java usage in professional insurance or agile digitalization contexts
